*[Intro]*  
  
***Am Dm Am Em7***  
***Am Dm C D***  
  
*[Verse]*  
  
  ***Am         Dm***  
I count the fallen tears  
  ***Am        Em7***  
They fall before my eyes  
  ***Am         Dm***  
Seems like a thousand years  
  ***Am           Em7***  
Since we broke the ties  
  ***Am           Dm***  
I call you on the phone  
  ***Am            Em7***  
But never get a rise  
  ***Am           Dm***  
So sit there all alone  
   ***C          D***  
It's time you realized  
  
*[Chorus]*  
  
  ***Am***  
I'm not your fool  
  ***F             G***  
Nobody's fool, nobody's fool  
  ***C    G     Am***  
I'm no fool  
  ***F         G***  
Nobody's fool, nobody's fool  
  ***C          G      Am***  
Never again, no no  
  
*[Verse]*  
  
   ***Am          Dm***  
You take your road, I'll take mine  
   ***Am          Em7***  
The paths have both been beat  
   ***Am           Dm***  
Searching for a change of pace  
   ***Am      C             D***  
Life needs to be sweetened  
   ***Am               Dm***  
I screeeaaam my heart out  
   ***Am           Em7***  
Just to make a dime  
   ***Am***             N.C.  
With that dime I bought your love  
   ***C              D***  
But now I've changed my mind  
  
*[Chorus]*  
  
    ***Am***  
I'm not your fool  
  ***F           G***  
Nobody's fool, nobody's fool

<!----><!--2024-02-09 00:02:13-->  
*Standard tune*  
  
   ***G***  
Everybody needs a little place they can hide  
   ***D***  
somewhere to call their own, don't let nobody inside  
    ***C                   G***  
every now and then we all need to let go  
    ***D***  
for some its the doctor for me its rock and roll  
    ***C                       G***  
For some its the bottle for some its the pill  
    ***C                         G***  
some people wave the bible cause its givin them a thrill  
    ***C                           G***  
others point their finger if they don't like what they see  
    ***D***  
if you live in a glass house don't be throwing rocks at me  
                                                     (Chorus)  
   ***C           G            A***  
we all need a little shelter, just a little helper  
   ***D***  
to get us by  
   ***C          G                A***  
we all need a little shelter, just a little helper  
   ***G***  
and it'll be alright  
  
   ***G***  
Check out mr. Politician in his suite and tie  
   ***D***  
but when the doors ar closed there aint nothin he won't try  
   ***C                       G***  
Meanwhile mr. Medicine's treatin his best friend's  
   ***D***  
wife  
   ***G***  
Tipper led the war against the record industry  
   ***C                       G***  
She said she saw the devil on  MTV  
   ***C                          G***  
To look into the cabinet it takes more than a key  
    ***D***  
Just like Jimmy's skeletons and his fantasy  
  
*(Chorus) (Solo)*  
  
    ***G                         D***  
For some its the needle for some its the kill  
    ***C                           G***  
some people wave the bible cause its givin them a thrill  
    ***C                           G***  
you can spend your money before you get your pay  
    ***D***  
with a toss of the dice you can piss it all away  
  
*Tabbed by Chaz Bitner, crbitner@hotmail.com.*<!--n:Shelter Me:s:3151:e:3224-->

<!----><!--2024-02-09 22:44:05-->  
*[Intro]*  
  
  ***A      D***  
  
*[Verse 1]*  
  
  ***D***  
Woke up this morning on the wrong side of bed  
                                ***A***  
I got this feeling like a train's running through my head  
  ***D***  
Turned on my radio to the same old song  
                                ***A***  
Some big mouth talking trying to tell us where the world went wrong  
  ***E***  
But all this talk of peace and love  
  ***E***  
It's only for the news  
  ***D***  
Cause everytime you trust someone  
  ***C***  
You end up getting screwed  
  
*[Chorus]*  
  ***D***  
The more things change  
  ***A***  
The more they stay the same  
                               ***E***  
Everyone's your brother till you turn the other way  
  ***D***  
The more things change  
  ***A***  
The more they stay the same  
  ***F#m          D                    A***  
All we need's a miracle to take us all away from the pain  
  
*[Verse 2]*  
  
  ***D***  
Came to this morning I was feeling mighty used  
                                      ***A***  
Picked up the telephone but all I got's a major attitude  
  ***D***  
Turned on the TV to the same old news  
                        ***C                  A***  
Everybody thinks they got the answer to the same old blues  
  ***E***  
Like a hot smokin' pistol on a saturday night  
        ***D***  
You gotta go for the throat  
        ***C***  
You gotta fight for your life  
  
*[Chorus]*  
  
  ***D***  
The more things change  
  ***A***  
The more they stay the same  
                            ***E***

  ***A***  
Take me away

  ***F#m  D   A***

<!----><!--2024-01-30 22:37:08-->  
Тональность: *G*  
  
    ***G        D6add7       G***  
A Dream is a wish your heart makes  
  
    ***G       B7    C      E7***  
When you're fast asleep  
  
    ***Am      E6       Am     Am7***  
In dreams you will lose your heartache  
  
    ***D7     Am7    G      D+***  
Whatever you wish for, you keep  
  
    ***G         D6add7         G***  
Have faith in your dreams and someday  
  
    ***G      B7    C          C/B    Am***  
Your rainbow will come smiling through  
  
    ***Am7                 F7***  
No matter how your heart is grieving  
  
    ***G    Bm7add5     Em7***  
If you keep on believing  
  
    ***Am7         D7         G***  
The dreams that you wish will come true<!--n:A Dream Is A Wish Your Heart Makes:s:15746:e:1231-->
<!----><!--2024-02-09 23:13:08-->  
*INTRO* (4X) ***B    A   B***  
  
  ***A               B      A    B***  
I used to be now I'm not what you see, Lord I try  
  ***A              B   A      B***  
And now it seems all those dreams have come true, but they're passing me by  
  ***D                A                    E***  
Some fast talkin' mama for a dollar put a smile on my face  
  ***D***  
I'm drivin' all night  
  ***A              G     F#***  
I end up in the same old place  
  ***B               E***  
My gypsy road can't take me home  
  ***A                  E***  
I drive all night just to see the light  
  ***B                E***  
My gypsy road can't take me home  
  ***A           E         B   A  B  B  A  B***  
I keep on pushin' cause it feels alright  
  ***A             B   A B***  
And who's to care if I grow my hair to the sky  
      ***A              B   A B***  
I'll take a wish and a prayer cross my fingers cause I always get by  
      ***D                 A                   E***  
Some fast talkin' jerk for a dollar wiped the smile off my face  
      ***D***  
I'm drivin' all night  
   ***A            G     F#***  
Just to keep the rat in the race  
   ***B               E***  
My gypsy road can't take me home  
   ***A                E***  
I drive all night just to see the light  
    ***B                E***  
My gypsy road can't take me home  
   ***A      E         B   A B  B A B***  
I keep on pushin' cause it feels alright  
    ***C#m                 A***  
Sometimes I feel so old  
     ***E***  
Got my lights burnin' bright  
     ***B***  
But I'm lookin' pretty sold  
   ***C#m               A***  
Sometimes I feel so cold  
   ***B***  
So cold  
Let's go  
  
*SOLO:* ***D A E***  
        ***D A G F# B***  
  
***B E A E***  
***B    E A E***  
Got to get on home  
  ***B     E      A      E***  
My gypsy road    can't take me home  
    ***B      E     A       E***  
My gypsy road    can't take me home, t-t-take me  
    ***B               E***  
My gypsy road can't take me home  
    ***A                 E***  
I drive all night just to see the light  
    ***B                E***  
My gypsy road can't take me home  
   ***A                E***  
I keep on pushin' cause it feels alright  
   ***B                E***  
My gypsy road can't take me home  
   ***A                 E***  
I drive all night just to see the light  
   ***B                E***  
My gypsy road can't take me home  
   ***A             E***  
I keep on p-p-p-p-p-p-p-pushin'  
   ***B              E***  
My gypsy road  
   ***A          E***  
My gypsy road<!--n:Gypsy Road:s:17036:e:4524-->
<!----><!--2024-02-09 00:48:12-->
*[Intro]*  
  
***G  G  Cadd9 G***  (x2)  
***G G D G***  
(keep playing the G chord until the verse begins)  
  
*[Verse 1]*  
  
   ***D***  
I took a walk down a road  
   ***C       G   C     G***  
It's the road I was meant to stay  
   ***Em***  
I see the fire in your eyes  
   ***C           G   C     G***  
But a man's got to make his way  
  
*[Chorus]*  
  
  ***C                    G***  
So are you tough enough for my love?  
  ***Em                   C***  
Just close your eyes to the heaven above  
  ***C             C*** (picking)  
I'm coming home  
  ***G    C  G    G    C   G***  
I'm coming home  
  
*[Verse 2]*  
  
  ***D***  
I took a ride in a world  
  ***C      G   C G***  
I'll be spinnin' for the rest of my life  
  ***Em***  
I feel your heart beatin' baby  
  ***C           G   C G***  
Oooh sometimes it cuts like a knife  
  
*[Chorus]*  
  
  ***C                  G***  
So are you tough enough for my love?  
  ***Em                  C***  
Just close your eyes to the heaven above  
  ***C                C*** (picking)  
I'm coming home  
  ***G       C G***  
I'm coming home  
    ***Em***  
I'm coming home  
  
*[Bridge]*  
  
   ***C***  
Where your love tonight  
   ***G    C    G***  
Can shine on me  
   ***Am***  
I'm coming home  
  
    ***C***  
Where your lovin' arms  
  ***D       G7***  
Can set me free  
   ***G G7***  
   ***G      G7***  
Ooh, hoo, hoo  
    ***G G7 G***  
  
*[Solo]*  
  
  ***Fmaj7 G C Fmaj7 G C Fmaj7 G***  
  
*[Verse 3]*  
  
  ***D***  
I took a walk down a road  
  ***C        G    C G***  
It's the road I was meant to stay  
  ***Em***  
I see the fire in your eyes  
  ***C       G   C G***  
But a man's got to make his way  
  
*[Chorus]*  
  
  ***C                G***  
So are you tough enough for my love?  
  ***Em             C***  
Just close your eyes to the heaven above  
    ***C         C*** (picking)  
I'm coming home  
  ***G    C G       G       C G***  
I'm coming home  
  ***C    Fmaj7   G***  
I'm coming home  
  ***C    Fmaj7   G***  
  
Oh yeah  
  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
I'm on my way oh yeah  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
I'm coming home, ooh, ohh  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
I'm coming home  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Here we go ooo yeah, ooo  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
I'm on my way  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Come on baby, come on now  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Let your love, shine on me  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Sing along, I'm on my way  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Come on baby, oooh, oooh, oooh, oooh  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Shine on, shine on, shine on me  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Come on baby, I'm on my way  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Come on baby, let you love shine on me  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Oh yeah, shine on me  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
Oh yeah, shine on, shine on me  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***  
I'm on my way  
   ***C       Fmaj7   G***

<!----><!--2026-02-07 15:01:56--><!--cover:--><!--gypsy_road:3336373437313531b58837313533b2303732300000/583fea53729bcb119bc1099a0dc5e73d/3.mp3--><!--nobody_s_fool:3336373437313531b38c3731353336b73036b20400/583fea53729bcb119bc1099a0dc5e73d/1.mp3--><!--shelter_me:3336373437313531b38c3731353332333536360700/21f6974ff3ab32db78d61ba42b09283e/1.mp3-->Американская *глэм-рок* группа из Филадельфии, существовавшая в *1983-2017* годы.
Основатель, вокалист и гитарист *Том Кейфер*.<!--n:about:s:26450:e:7294-->
